weekly.label: 周报
weekly.description: 按周查看 GitHub / GitHub 中文社区 / DeepWiki 热点项目归档。

monthly.label: 月报
monthly.description: 按月查看 GitHub / GitHub 中文社区 / DeepWiki 热点项目归档。

weekly: 周报写作以 GitHub Trending weekly 为主榜，先按原始热榜顺序锁定重点项目。
每个项目优先补抓 GitHub 仓库、DeepWiki 结构页，以及可用的 GitHub 中文社区项目页。
周报正文后续改由 AI 按规则搜集、书写并同步，侧栏不再展示自动分析总结。
monthly: 月报写作以 GitHub Trending monthly 为主榜，优先观察持续在榜和主题迁移的项目。
每个项目优先补抓 GitHub 仓库、DeepWiki 结构页，以及可用的 GitHub 中文社区项目页。
月报正文后续改由 AI 按规则搜集、书写并同步，侧栏不再展示自动分析总结。

OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration. Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.
Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.
